name: Manage Food Supply Chain Risk
description: Process of identifying and mitigating supply chain risks specific to food safety, quality, and regulatory compliance, including critical control points, allergen management, and cold chain integrity
sector_specific_kpis: percentage of suppliers with valid food safety certifications
number of critical control points with validated logic
notes: Food safety decisions at critical control points require validated logic and automation to ensure accuracy and compliance. Integration with ERP, CRM, and supply chain management systems is crucial for real-time monitoring and decision-making.
